api_key.description: Buildkite API access token. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <api_key>; never logged.

base_url.description: Buildkite API base URL override for tests or proxies.

organization.description: Buildkite organization slug. Required for the pipelines, builds, and agents streams (organization-scoped); not needed for the top-level organizations stream.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only builds created at or after this time are read (sent as created_from).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
